evals.prompt: I need a contractor to test with
evals.expected_output: Should ask clarifying questions (Individual vs Business, wage type), then create a contractor via POST to the demo API using env config from sdk-app/env/.env.demo

evals.prompt: Create 3 employees in different onboarding states so I can test the employee list
evals.expected_output: Should create one admin_onboarding_incomplete employee (self_onboarding: false), one self_onboarding_invited (self_onboarding: true + email), and one fully onboarded employee. Should report all UUIDs in a summary table.

evals.prompt: Set up an unlimited PTO policy for my company
evals.expected_output: Should create a time off policy with policy_type vacation, accrual_method unlimited, and complete: true. Should NOT set accrual_rate, max_hours, or carryover_limit_hours (must be null for unlimited).
